plasma_wrench.name: Plasma Wrench
plasma_wrench.description: A heavy industrial tool used for repairing reactor components. The only tool capable of field-repairing a failed reactor node.

reactor_key.name: Reactor Key
reactor_key.description: A physical key required for emergency reactor shutdown. Without it, a runaway reactor cannot be safely stopped.

access_badge.name: Access Badge
access_badge.description: A badge encoding command-level clearance. Grants access to secured areas.

oxygen_scanner.name: Oxygen Scanner
oxygen_scanner.description: A handheld device that measures atmospheric composition. Useful for detecting if life support has been tampered with.

emergency_rations.name: Emergency Rations
emergency_rations.description: A sealed package of nutrient paste. Lasts indefinitely if unopened.

medical_kit.name: Medical Kit
medical_kit.description: A field kit containing basic trauma supplies and a mild stimulant.

effect.memory_inject: The kit steadied your hands and cleared your head.

stimulant_patch.name: Stimulant Patch
stimulant_patch.description: A neural stimulant patch. Single use. Sharpens perception noticeably.

effect.memory_inject: Your thoughts are suddenly faster, edges sharper.

sedative_patch.name: Sedative Patch
sedative_patch.description: A fast-acting sedative patch. Dulls threat assessment and produces a sense of calm compliance.

effect.memory_inject: A quiet warmth spreads through your thoughts. The urgency feels distant.

encrypted_comm.name: Encrypted Comm Device
encrypted_comm.description: A one-time-use encrypted communicator. Reading the pre-loaded message takes a full turn.
encrypted_comm.knowledge: No pre-loaded message. Override with scenario-specific knowledge.

nutrient_vat.name: Industrial Nutrient Vat
nutrient_vat.description: A massive, immovable tank of nutrient slurry. The station's primary food supply contingency.

seed_canister.name: Seed Canister
seed_canister.description: Contains genetically modified wheat seeds. Critical for long-term food production.

soda_1.name: Can of soda
soda_1.description: a can of refreshing soda that refreshes and hydrates

effect.memory_inject: the soda was refreshing and made me more alert
